case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, ET AL VS. CHRISTOPHER SANTANA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF ATLANTIC CREDIT FINANCE SPECIAL FINANCE UNIT LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-24-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-14-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-10-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 76944138): TSAI, KIMBERLEE RAE SUBSTITUTED FOR WINN, BRIAN N AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF ATLANTIC CREDIT FINANCE SPECIAL FINANCE UNIT LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A.

DECLARATION OF KRISTI LANOUE IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61912961) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF ATLANTIC CREDIT FINANCE SPECIAL FINANCE UNIT LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF ATLANTIC CREDIT FINANCE SPECIAL FINANCE UNIT LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTANA, CHRISTOPHER $3,692.08 PRINCIPAL, $367.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,059.08, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-14-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
